name: Moff Gideon
bannerMiniatureIdeas: Imperial light cruiser bridge holotable with glowing Phase-III Dark Trooper deployment schematic and a miniature tracking beacon
The Darksaber mounted on a beskar-alloy display stand flanked by twin Dark Trooper helmet totems
Nevarro lava-rock pedestal topped with a crushed Mandalorian signet and an Imperial Remnant command insignia
vehicleSuggestions: Gideon's Imperial light cruiser (orbital command ship and Dark Trooper hangar from The Mandalorian)
TIE/ln Fighter (Gideon's personal starfighter from the Nevarro siege)
Imperial Shuttle (Dark Trooper insertion craft used on Tython)

factionTrait.name: Duelist Champion
factionTrait.text: A duelist moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy champion.

uniqueTraits.name: Imperial Directive
uniqueTraits.text: The range of Moff Gideon's skill_enemy skills must be determined from a Phase-III Dark Trooper within 3 hexes of him.

ultimate.name: Dark Trooper Sweep
ultimate.text: Each enemy champion that is within 2 hexes of 1 or more Phase-III Dark Troopers gains 1 wound.

plotSkills.name: Deploy the Dark Troopers
plotSkills.text: The Phase-III Dark Troopers may make an advance action or a recruit action.

plotSkills.name: Imperial Precision
plotSkills.text: If a Phase-III Dark Trooper is within range they gain {accuracy_die_boon}.

clashSkills.name: Deploy the Dark Troopers
clashSkills.text: The Phase-III Dark Troopers may make an advance action or a recruit action.

clashSkills.name: Ruthless Execution
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: If the target is a champion it gains 1 wound.

traits.name: Jetpack Insertion
traits.text: During an advance action, the Phase-III Dark Troopers may move through other models' hexes but cannot end their movement on those hexes.

clashSkills.name: Power Fist
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: If the target is a champion it gains 1 wound.
